name: mnemo
description: Persistent memory layer for Claude Code and Codex via Obsidian — 8 skills for vault health, knowledge search, connection discovery, session continuity, memory routing, inbox triage, skill-aware session review, and interactive setup. MCP-first hybrid (shell-safe writes), dual-runtime helpers, hybrid model routing (4 forked haiku/sonnet + 4 inherit), parallel CLI calls, SessionStart prewarm, incremental JSONL parsing, shared references for gotchas / config / tool-routing. Any taxonomy.
